content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad market constructive — Nifty +0.25%, Pharma +2.05%, Auto +0.96%, Bank Nifty +0.63%, VIX -2.9% to 17.39. Global cues supportive (US +0.8-1.0%). Book is well-positioned with 11 CNC names at +0.36% session P&L; focus is on managing winners (PNBHOUSING, HAL, ADANIPORTS, COFORGE) and tightening SLs to lock in gains.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24250
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +6.3%. Current SL 1035 is already above entry 984 (locked-in gain ~5%). CMP 1046.50, SL 1035 sits 1.1% below CMP — meets 1% trail-gap discipline, no further tighten needed. Bullish thesis (Q4 PAT +19%, GNPA <1%) intact, target 1110 within reach. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Small unrealized -0.8%. SL 119 (-4.9% from CMP 124) absorbing normal noise. Gold consolidation; thesis (defensive hedge, medium-term constructive) intact. No action."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +1.9%, CMP 1733.90 near ATH 1748.60. Current SL already at 1715 (1.1% below CMP, +0.9% above entry — locked gain). Stored values match — no MODIFY needed. Reverting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.1%, CMP 206.72 vs SL 206. SL extremely close to CMP (~0.35% below), but Q4 turnaround thesis (PAT +68% YoY, NIM 6.2%, GNPA -140bps) intact and banking sector green. Letting market deliver verdict — if SL hits, exit is clean. Not loosening."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4555.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +1.8%, CMP 4657.40 (strong +2.15% session move on defence theme). Current SL=entry 4575. Move SL down slightly to 4555 — wait, that's loosening which is rejected. Actually CMP 4657.40 needs SL ≥1% below = max 4610. Trail SL up to 4610 (above entry, locks +0.77%). Trail-gap 1.02% — within discipline."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +1.8%, CMP 7028, SL 6950 (1.1% below CMP, locked gain ~+0.7%). Q4 PAT +124% YoY, EBITDA margin 34.2%. Thesis strong. SL placement adequate; no MODIFY (within discipline gap)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat -0.1%, CMP 834 vs SL 825 (1.1% gap). Order book Rs 13,955 cr, gap-up was strong but faded intraday. Holding to original SL/target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.3%, CMP 365.55 vs SL 358 (2.1% gap). Q4 PAT +30% YoY, lending crossed Rs 2L cr. Thesis intact post-results. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.4%, near 52w high. SL 812 (1.9% gap), target 855 intact. FMCG defensive. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.8%, CMP 3266 vs SL 3245 (0.65% gap — tight but not yet stopped). Q4 PAT +42% YoY, dividend Rs 33, strong session high 3315 faded. Intraday wobble within thesis tolerance. Hold to either SL or recovery."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1255.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +1.6%, CMP 1278.80 post Q4 blowout (+11% session). Current SL 1230 (3.9% below CMP) — too loose given gain. Trail SL up to 1255 (1.85% below CMP, locks -0.3% buffer near breakeven, well above the 1% trail-gap floor). Target unchanged at 1330. R:R from CMP: 51 reward / 23.80 risk = 2.1. Tightening risk while letting trade work."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1035 already 1.1% below CMP 1046.50, locking +5.2% gain. No-op MODIFY rule — leave alone."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Small loss within tolerance; defensive hedge."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1715 (above entry 1700, 1.1% below CMP)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL extremely close to CMP; let market decide."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 4610.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from 4575 → 4610 (above entry, 1% below CMP 4657). Locks +0.77% gain while preserving room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 6950 already +0.7% above entry, 1.1% below CMP. Adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat; original SL/target appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Within tolerance; post-Q4 thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Marginal gain; SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Wobble within tolerance; strong Q4 thesis."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1255.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail from 1230 to 1255 after +11% post-earnings move. R:R from CMP 1278: 51/23 = 2.2x."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "CHOLAHLDNG: Board meeting May 8 (2 sessions) — binary event, NO new entry per binary-event discipline. NEULANDLAB: Q4 results May 12 (4 sessions) and -60% YoY Q3 print fresh — NO entry. WOCKPHARMA: +21% spike, no entry without catalyst clarity. CAMS: gap-up +10.6% needs cooldown. VEDL: post-demerger price discovery dislocation, avoid. PNB: NII -4% YoY headwind, NO chase. HFCL: BUY 600x @ 133.50 OPEN order — leaving in place; thesis intact (3.1x volume, telecom infra, Vodafone Idea AGR relief). Will reassess if not filled by EOD.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 60% (cash 40%) — adequate buffer. 11 positions across diversified sectors (Financial Services 3 names = PNBHOUSING+ABCAPITAL+CHOLAHLDNG-watch; Banking BANDHANBNK; Capital Goods 2 = HAL+TITAGARH; Auto M&M; FMCG MARICO; IT COFORGE; Logistics ADANIPORTS; Chemicals NAVINFLUOR; ETF GOLDBEES). No new entries this tick — focus is risk management on a constructive day with 4 winners (PNBHOUSING +6.3%, COFORGE +1.6%, HAL +1.8%, NAVINFLUOR +1.8%, ADANIPORTS +1.9%). Two SL trails emitted (HAL, COFORGE) where gains warranted locking in. No event-trade entries given Q4 binary calendar density. Will revisit afternoon if HFCL OPEN order fills or new high-conviction setups emerge."
}
